title: Axiomus
description: Do you want to play with Axiom, WorldEdit, good fps and mods that make your game convinient and pleasure? So this Mod Pack is for you. Here you will find everything that you need fot comfortable game!
body:
There are a lot of mods in this mod pack that improve your gameplay from different angles.

This is one of the first mod packs with _Axiom_.

The combination of this mod and _WorldEdit_ will allow you to edit the terrain, build and create with all the comforts. _Sodium_, its add-ons and some other mods will help you get rid of lags and boost fps. You can also set up your chat as it is convenient. Thanks to _Iris_, _ETF_, _EMF_, _Continuity_ and _Animatica_, you can use almost any texture pack, resource pack or shader pack. Do not forget the mods that will help you with PvP, for example _AppleSkin_, _LootBeams_, _InvMove_ and others. There are also mods aimed at a comfortable game: _Shulker Box Tooltip_, _Bobby_, _Mouse Tweaks_, _Gamma Utils_, _Xaeroe's Minimap_, etc.

**WARNING**. Some of these mods are not allowed on some servers. Especially for this, there is _ModSets_ here, which will allow you to disable unnecessary mods right in the game.

Please download the mod pack along with the "config" folder if you want to use my settings for some mods, such as _lootBeams_.

The mod responsible for duplicating text in a second language is _LangSplit_
